titleStmt.title: SII 9.433: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 433. (A.R. No. 19 of 1910.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE BASAVESVARA TEMPLE AT SINGANALLUR, COIMBATORE TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Kali 4522 (4509), Śaka 1330, Sarvadhāri, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 13, Ma[ndavāra ?], corresponding to A.D. 1408 August 4, Saturday, in the reign of Vīra-Dēvarāya-Mahārāya, son of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Harihara-Mahārāya. The king is described as being well-versed in music and literature. The inscription records an agreement entered into by the Gauḍas, Seṭṭis, Brahmachāris, Brāhmans, Sēnabōvas and the Eighteen Samayas of Baṇḍiyahaḷḷi-Mōdeyahaḷḷi which belonged to Vīraṇṇa-Ayya, a subordinate of the Mahāpradhāna Nāgaṇṇa Nāyaka-Oḍeya. The terms were that the number of the families of cultivators would be according to the number of houses occupied; the amount of taxes payable on grains, bullocks, clarified butter, sugar and other things, to the palace by each family would be fixed and regularly paid; if any family or families ran away, the Gauḍas responsible would bring them back or pay the amount due from them; if the head of a family died, his successor would pay the amount due; if necessary, family jewellery would be sold to pay off the sum due to the palace; and if any one stole any thing in the house of the chief, the same rule held good, that is to say, those who were responsible for him would make good the loss.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
subhamastu . svasti śrīkalivaruṣa 4522 neya śakavaruṣa
1330 neya sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śu 13 ma svasti sama
stabhuvanabhūmaṁḍalabhujādaṁḍakīrti bra(ṁ)hmāṁḍa varttamāna rā
jādhirāja rājaparamēsvara saṁgītavidyāsāgara sāhityavidyā
kalāviśālāvatāra raṇamukharāma gajamukhabhīma Ā
magadheyarāyamānamadamarddana bhāsege tappuva rāya
ra gaṁḍa catuḥsamudrādhipati śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
ḷēsvara hariharamahārāyara kumāra vīradēvarā
yamahārāyaru siṁhvāsanadalū pritvīrājyaṁgeyu
ttirvalli śrīmanu(ṁ)māhāpradhānaṁ nāgaṁṇāyakaOḍeya
ra Agñādhārakarumappa vīraṁṇaAyyagaḷa huṭhuvaḷiya
kaṁmattada baṁḍiyahaḷimōdeyahaḷiya nāḍa sama
stha sālu mūleyoḷagāda padineṁṭu samayakke mukhyavā
da gauḍu ce(ṁ)nnamāyaṁṇanavara maga māyaṁṇa siva
ppanavara maga liṁgaṁṇa maṁjeyanāyakanavara maga naṁ
jaṇa kariyaṁṇa mārana maga cikaṁṇa mācaṇa masaṇappa maga ya
paṁṇa baṁḍiyahaḷiya perumāḷadēvana mādaṁṇa mōṭagau
ṁḍana soṁṇappa mōdeyahaḷiya vāsugauḍa ba(ṁ)mmaṇaṁ siṁ
ḍamāḍiya kāḷappa huluvaṁje siṁgaṇana maga bhīma(ṁ)ṇṇana pē
rappa siṁdanāgaṁṇa dēvigauḍiya nāra perumāḷeya dēvō
jaṇa gauḍamaṁgalada haradēva māyigauḍeya siṁdagauḍara
magauḍana tamma cokkaṁṇa kaṁṇanūra hōcigauḍana māva teṁkaṇasthaḷa
da māradēva kāḷabaṁṭa kāḷpa sirabuccaṇa kāmagauḍa dēva liṁgadēva kāmu
ktaruṁ biṭa sthaḷada rakkasagauḍa mūḍaṇasthaḷada hāruvagauḍa keṁpagau
ḍa kuṟuhaṭiya sthaḷada malajīya rāyaṁṇa seṭṭihaḷiya mārpa
kavaḍihaḷiya māra . guḍināḍa sthaḷada gaṁṭeyapa saṁkaṁṇa
nāḍa mādagauḍa doḍḍayakeṁpaṇa mārpa kāḷpa siṁgaṇa kāḷpa kulā
ya staḷada ba(ṁ)mmaṇaseṭṭiya kaṁbagauḍa siṁdahoriya kaṭu
yēkā siddaṁṇa dēvaṁṇa telagahaḷiya sthaḷada cokkaṁṇa
rāyaṇa kāḷpa sidamaleya sthaḷada seṭṭiyappa ba(ṁ)mmaṇa Ū
ta(ṁ)mmaṁṇa māyigauḍa soṁṇappa soṁṇagauḍa
haḷiya moḷehaḷiya gollagauṁḍa kittigauḍa kētaṁṇanoḷa
gāda gauḍuprajegaḷu ta(ṁ)mma svāmi kaṭapaseṭṭiya maga kaṁdu
rākaṁṇana maga rājappa yiṁmaḍiseṭṭiya maga kētimalliseṭṭi
rēviseṭṭiya maga mādiseṭṭi Ālappaseṭṭiya maga gajaseṭṭi Oḷa
gāda seṭṭi svāmi khaṁḍaguddali bōgāṟa bammiseṭṭiya maga
kēriya kāḷiseṭṭi Oḷagāda samasta byavahārigaḷuṁ brāhmaṇa
ma(ṁ)nnēra Upādhyara māṇi maṁḍalapuruṣanāḍa sēnabōva peru
māḷedēvana maga rāyappa māyaṁṇanavara sēnabō
va vīraṁṇa kāmaṇṇa taṁbāru sēnabōva madāvi
siṁgaperumāḷe suṁkadanāya cokkaṇa peṁmaṇa sālu
mūleyoḷagada hadineṁṭu samayaū kūḍi Ācaṁdrā
rkkasthāyiĀgi barasida silāsāsanada kramaveṁteṁdeḍe na(ṁ)mma nā
ḍiṁge saluva catussīmeyoḷagāda haḷi hiriyūra sālumū
leyo(o)ḷagāda hadineṁṭu sameyada Okkalugaḷige māḍida ka
ṭṭaḷe na(ṁ)mma nāḍahaḷi hiriyūra ma(ṁ)ṇṇumaneya mēle
candasīme saṁkyāsamada mēle kuḷava kaṭṭikoṁbeU naṣṭi
yanaṟidu biṭṭa tuṣṭiyanaṟitu kaṭṭikoṁbeU Ara
maneyara mottavanū tappade teṟuveU Aramane Iṁ
da khāṇa dhānya yettu tuppa sabara māṭṭadaḷa mōḷa mu
ṁtāda veccavirāḍavanu kuḷa saradiyali teṟuveŪ A
ramaneyiṁda baṁde Uttāra baṁdaḍe kuḷasaradiyali Uttari
sikoṁbeU sālabaḷiya sidhāyavanū dōsa haḷiya daṁ
ḍavanū Arasugaḷige teṟuveU tappu tagādi daṁḍa Uṁḍige
Eṁdu nāḍavaḷikāṟa prabhugaḷu koḷasalla prathamastaḷa saṁjātavā
da haḷikāṟa haravāgi gauḍuṁkeyāgi Aramane
teṟumārugaḷanū Uṁḍigeya kirukoḷa salla naṁma nāḍa haḷi hi
riyūrugaḷa hadineṁṭu jātigū vokkalu hoṇeyilla guṟu
tugaḷigī Ūralu Okkalu Ōḍihōdaḍe Ā Ūrū Ā gauḍanū A
Okkalanāḷvonu teṟuvanū Okkala Ūrugaḷū Ōḍidaḍe gauḍaga
ḷuṁ yidiru hoṇeya koḍasalla hadineṇṭu sameyadavarū
hōgi Ā Okkalu Ūranū taṁma Avaru Ida Ūralli yirisi rājā
rtthavanū tīṟisikoḍuvaru naḍavaḷikāṟa prabhugaḷu saṁjātadaha
ḷigaḷu Okkalugaḷakayyalū nālkeraḍu hoṁnu koṁḍadaṟi
ṁda Ōḍi hōdaḍe Ā naṣṭavanū prabhugaḷu kaṭṭikoṁḍu teṟuvaru gau
ḍugaḷiṁda Ā(ṁ)nyāyavillade Okkalu Ōḍihōdaḍe nāḍige Ā Okka
la siddhāya kaṭṭikoṁḍu teṟuvaru na(ṁ)mma nāḍa sthaḷadalū Ūru
gaḷū Ōḍihōdaḍe Ā naṣṭa sthaḷada gauḍagaḷē kaṭi
koṁḍu teṟuvaru Okkalugaḷū sattukeṭṭu hōdare taṁdeya Oḍa
ve magage Aṁṇanoḍave taṁmage taṁmanoḍave Aṁṇaṁgā
gi sattavana Oḍaveyanū tegadukoṁḍu Avanu Aramanege
teṟuva siddhāyavanu varuśavaruśaṁprati tettubahudu siṁgaṇa
nalūra sēnabōva sāṁkhyānagōtrada vīraṁṇa haḷihiriya
ralu mānyada gadde beddalu tōṭavanū nāḍa sēnabōva rā
yappana nāḍa sēnabōkeyanū Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyā
gi naḍasibahudu nāḍa prabhugaḷu tējasvāmyavanū stā
namā(ṁ)nya pūrvvamariyādigī nāḍu naḍasuvaru Eṁdu E(ṁ)
mmanāḍa yadiṁ Oḍaṁbaṭṭu barada sāsana I sāsanakke
Āvanobba tappidavanū gaṁgeya taḍiyalu taṁma taṁdeya
koṁda pāpakke hōharu koṁda pāpakke hōha
ru I mariyādege nāḍa sēnabōva rāypana svahasta baraha
�yo dinaṁ modalāgi prāku nāḍavara he
sara puṇyaū Anāḍa vaḷikāṟa prabhugaḷa maneya
lu yiddarū sama .
Digital edition of SII 9.433 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
